evals.prompt: 在 TODO.md 里记录一个新 bug：点击侧边栏标签没有过滤效果，文件位置是 Sidebar.tsx:53
evals.expected_output: Adds a new bug entry to the TODO.md file in the '已知问题' table with the description, file location, and impact

evals.prompt: 帮我清理 TODO.md 中已完成的项
evals.expected_output: Removes or archives completed TODO items (those with [x] or ~~strikethrough~~) to keep the file clean and manageable

evals.prompt: 添加一个需求：需要实现数据导入功能，位置在 ImportExportModal.tsx:34
evals.expected_output: Adds a new feature request section with proper formatting, including status, file location, and checklist items

evals.prompt: 完成第5个TODO：实现主题切换功能
evals.expected_output: Reads the TODO item #5, reads the relevant code files, implements the theme toggle functionality, and marks the TODO as completed
